designConstraints: Must use 8px spacing unit grid system with scale values [4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64]px
Maximum 3 levels of visual hierarchy across all analytical cards
Desktop-first layout at 1440px viewport with 12-column grid, 24px gutters, 24px margins, max content width 1280px
All card surfaces must use navy-surface (#1E293B) background with elevation level 1 shadow (0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3))
Chart and data visualization containers must use navy-raised (#293548) as inner surface background
Border radius: cards use large (16px), inner elements use medium (10px), badges and chips use pill (9999px) or small (6px)
TopBar, MonthSelector, NavigationTabs, and SettingsDialog must be visually consistent with dashboard and add-expense pages as shared components
ExportCSVButton must be right-aligned below all content cards, using gold-amber (#F59E0B) as CTA primary color with deep-navy (#0F172A) text
TrendIndicator must use teal-success (#14B8A6) for positive trends and coral-error (#F87171) for negative trends
ChartTypeToggle must use pill-shaped toggle with gold-amber active state indicator
AverageDashedLine must be visually distinct from chart bars/lines using muted-text (#64748B) or gold-amber (#F59E0B) dashed stroke
SpendingDiffBadge must use semantic color tokens: teal-success for under-budget, coral-error for over-budget, gold-amber for warning states
NoDataEmptyState must occupy the full content area of its parent card with centered layout
RankedExpenseRow must have minimum touch target height of 44px and be keyboard-activatable for navigation to add-expense edit flow
Motion: chart transitions use normal duration (300ms) with default easing cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); toggle switches use fast duration (150ms)
Focus ring: 2px gold-amber (#F59E0B) outline with 2px offset on all interactive elements
Disabled state opacity: 0.38 for unavailable controls
Z-index: ChartTooltip must use tooltip z-index (1400), SettingsDialog modal uses modal z-index (1200)
referencePatterns: Three-stat summary header with StatCell grid pattern — horizontal row of equal-width stat cells with label, value, and TrendIndicator sub-component
Card-based analytical data display pattern — each major section (period summary, daily chart, top categories, biggest expenses, month comparison) wrapped in a Card component at elevation level 1
Toggleable chart type pattern — ChartTypeToggle pill control above DailySpendingChart, toggling between bar and line chart renderings with smooth 300ms transition
Stacked progress bar pattern — StackedCategoryBar showing proportional category segments with CategoryDetailRow per-row progress indicators below
Ranked list pattern — BiggestExpensesCard with RankedExpenseRow items showing rank number, merchant, category badge, amount, and tappable row for edit navigation
Month-over-month comparison card pattern — ComparisonBars showing current vs previous month side-by-side bars with SpendingDiffBadge summary
Filter bar with MonthSelector navigation — consistent with dashboard page month navigation pattern in TopBar area
Empty state pattern — NoDataEmptyState with centered illustration, heading, and descriptive body text when no data exists for selected month
Dashed average line overlay — AverageDashedLine rendered as SVG overlay on DailySpendingChart with label annotation
Right-aligned utility action pattern — ExportCSVButton positioned at bottom-right of page content area, outside card containers
Category color dot legend pattern — consistent with CategoryLegend on dashboard, using category color_token for visual identification
accessibilityRequirements: WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of 4.5:1 minimum for all text; silver-text (#CBD5E1) on navy-surface (#1E293B) achieves approximately 10.6:1
WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of 3:1 minimum for large text (24px+) and UI components including chart bars and progress indicators
All chart components (DailySpendingChart, StackedCategoryBar, ComparisonBars) must provide accessible text alternatives via aria-label or visually hidden data tables
ChartTooltip must be announced by screen readers when triggered via keyboard focus on chart data points
TrendIndicator must not rely solely on color to convey trend direction — must include directional icon (arrow up/down) and text label
SpendingDiffBadge must not rely solely on color — must include text value and directional symbol
ChartTypeToggle must use role='group' with aria-label='Chart type' and individual radio-style buttons with aria-pressed or aria-checked states
RankedExpenseRow items must be keyboard navigable with Enter/Space activation, role='button' or native anchor, and descriptive aria-label including merchant, amount, and category
StatCell values must have associated aria-label combining the stat label and value for screen reader context
MonthSelector navigation controls must have aria-label='Previous month' and aria-label='Next month' with current month announced as aria-live region
ExportCSVButton must have descriptive aria-label='Export expenses for [month] [year] as CSV'
NoDataEmptyState must have role='status' or aria-live='polite' to announce when content changes to empty state
All interactive elements must have minimum touch target size of 44x44px per design token specification

Focus order must follow logical reading order: TopBar → MonthSelector → PeriodSummaryHeader → DailySpendingChart → ChartTypeToggle → TopCategoriesCard → BiggestExpensesCard → MonthComparisonCard → ExportCSVButton → NavigationTabs
AverageDashedLine must include an aria-label or legend entry describing the average value it represents
CategoryDetailRow progress bars must use role='progressbar' with aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax, and aria-label including category name and percentage
SettingsDialog must trap focus when open and restore focus to trigger element on close, with role='dialog' and aria-modal='true'
Page must have a descriptive document title: 'Spending Insights — Personal Expense Tracker'
Heading hierarchy must be maintained: page-level h1 for PeriodSummaryHeader section, h2 for each card section title
dataModelDependencies: Expense entity — used by BiggestExpensesCard (RankedExpenseRow) and ExportCSVButton; fields: id, amount, merchant, category_id, date, payment_method_id, note, currency
Category entity — used by TopCategoriesCard (CategoryDetailRow, StackedCategoryBar) and RankedExpenseRow category badge; fields: id, name, color_token, color_hex, icon
Budget entity — used by PeriodSummaryHeader for budget vs actual comparison and SpendingDiffBadge threshold evaluation; fields: id, month, year, amount, currency
DailyAggregate entity — used by DailySpendingChart and AverageDashedLine calculation; fields: id, date, total_amount, transaction_count, month, year
CategoryAggregate entity — used by TopCategoriesCard (StackedCategoryBar, CategoryDetailRow) and PeriodSummaryHeader; fields: id, category_id, month, year, total_amount, transaction_count, percentage

MonthlyComparison entity — used by PeriodSummaryHeader (StatCell, TrendIndicator), MonthComparisonCard (ComparisonBars, SpendingDiffBadge); fields: total_spent, daily_average, transaction_count, comparison deltas vs previous month
UserSettings entity — used by MonthSelector (locale formatting), ExportCSVButton (currency in CSV headers), and all currency display; fields: currency, locale
